login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue building your network.

register.title: Join LinkUp and start professional conversations.
register.subtitle: Follow professionals, share updates, and build your professional presence.
register.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

home.title: LinkUp helps you connect with friends, share moments, and discover the world around you.
home.subtitle: A modern social experience: lively feed, personal profiles, friend connections, and real-time chat.

features.feed_text: Stay updated with the latest stories from your friends and community.
features.follow_text: Follow interesting people and keep up with their latest updates.
features.profiles_text: Create your personal profile and express your true self.
features.messages_text: Chat privately and securely with your friends anytime, anywhere.

feed.no_posts_body: Create the first update or follow more people to build your professional feed.
feed.no_contacts: Follow people to see contacts here.

post.share_update: Share an update with your network...

stories.caption_placeholder: Add a caption to your story...

saved.title: Saved
saved.subtitle: Posts you saved for later.
saved.empty_body: Save posts to find them here.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Discover public posts and trending conversations across LinkUp.

search.title: Search
search.empty_query: Enter a keyword from the search bar.

profile.details_unavailable: Profile details could not be loaded from the backend. Basic account information is shown from your login session.
profile.private_content: You do not have permission to view this content, or this account is private.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account preferences.
settings.section_pending: This section is ready for backend preferences when those APIs are available.
settings.notifications_subtitle: Choose how LinkUp notifies you about activity.
settings.privacy_subtitle: Control profile visibility, personal account details, and playback behavior.
settings.security_subtitle: Manage password, sessions, and security preferences.
settings.support_subtitle: Support tools will be connected when backend support APIs are available.
settings.profile_load_error: Profile details could not be loaded from the backend.
settings.personalize_text: Custom themes and exclusive features for your profile.
settings.headline: Headline
settings.content_visibility_body: Allow your content to be visible publicly where backend rules permit it.
settings.search_indexing_body: Allow search engines to index your profile.
settings.autoplay_videos_body: Play feed videos automatically on scroll.
settings.private_account_body: Approve followers before they can follow your updates.
settings.danger_body: Deactivate your account and revoke active refresh sessions.
settings.deactivate_confirm: Deactivate this account? You will be signed out immediately.
settings.email_notifications_body: Receive updates about follows, messages, and comments.
settings.push_notifications_body: Show realtime notifications while browsing LinkUp.
settings.password_mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
settings.two_factor_body: Store the two-factor preference for your account.
settings.support_pending_body: The backend does not expose help center, report, or ticket APIs yet, so this tab is intentionally informational only.
settings.backend_unavailable_body: This area is intentionally not editable yet because the backend does not expose a matching settings API. It will be connected once the corresponding endpoints are added.

connections.find_people_body: Search by name or email, then follow professionals you want to track.
connections.enter_keyword: Enter a keyword to start searching.
connections.empty_following: You are not following anyone yet.

chat.could_not_load: Could not load conversations from the backend.
chat.choose_body: Select a conversation to start messaging.
chat.call_unavailable: Voice and video calls require backend signaling/WebRTC. The backend does not expose that API yet.
chat.enter_hint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line
